channel.title: Pop Music on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Pop Music on Have an average day :|

item.title: Pop Danthology 2012 - Mashup of 50+ Pop Songs
item.description: I saw a post Reddit about this. OP says it took 500 hours to put together. You can really see that effort put into this video. It’s truly an example of 2012 pop music. I’m not a fan my self but I’m wowed by this. I hope you are too.
